title: DonutAuctions - DonutSMP Mod
description: Simple QOL mod for donutsmp.net that shows you what an item is worth on the Auction House, directly within your inventory!
body:
# DonutAuctions
Quality of life Mod for ``donutsmp.net`` that allows you to see the lowest Price an Item sells for on the Auction House, just by hovering over it.
The "value" is calculated by taking the cheapest item on the Auction House, that matches your item regarding
- material
- enchantments
- (soon) armor trims

# Setup (Important!!!)
> DonutSMP recently made some changes, which now require you to link your discord account in order to run /api. So to use this mod, you have to go to the DonutSMP discord and link your accoutn with them.
This Mod uses the DonutSMP API in Order to query active Auctions. To do this, the Mod needs your API-Key. By Running the ``/api`` on ``Donutsmp.net``, the Mod automatically copies your API-Key and stores it. This means you only need to run this Command ONCE, when first Using the Mod. __The Mod will not use your API key for anything but querying Auctions__
